task_completion.description: Verify that the dataset 'cps5_small.gdt' is opened in the statistical software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of Gretl shows 'cps5_small' loaded, typically visible in the title bar or the dataset information section, indicating 1200 observations.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new variable 'lwage' has been generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variable 'lwage' appears as a new row in the main Gretl variable list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the interaction variable 'female_exper' has been generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variable 'female_exper' appears as a new row in the main Gretl variable list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the OLS regression model has been estimated with the correct dependent and independent variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A model results window is visible showing an OLS regression. 'lwage' must be listed as the dependent variable, and the regressors list must include 'const', 'educ', 'female', 'exper', and 'female_exper'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the regression output is saved to '~/Documents/gretl_output/interaction_results.txt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows the file 'interaction_results.txt' inside the 'gretl_output' directory, or a text editor is open showing the saved Gretl regression output with the correct file path visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used Gretl to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Gretl GUI (variable list, model specification dialogs, or model output windows) being actively used, rather than just a terminal window echoing text.

integrity.description: Check that the saved text file contains genuine software output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of 'interaction_results.txt' should match the standard formatting of a Gretl regression output table, not manually typed or mocked-up text.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the software to directly create a fake results file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using a text editor or echo commands to manually write the statistical results without first generating them in Gretl.
